description_long: This is a visually appealing cupcake with a metallic teal wrapper, topped with a generous swirl of light pink frosting. The frosting is adorned with a large, realistic-looking whole strawberry at the peak, surrounded by several thinly sliced strawberry pieces embedded into the icing. The cake base is slightly visible beneath the frosting, suggesting a classic vanilla or sponge cake. The frosting appears creamy and smooth, with a glossy sheen that enhances its appetizing look. The overall presentation is playful and inviting, making it suitable for display in a bakery window or at a festive urban event.
description: A cupcake with pink swirled frosting, topped with a whole strawberry and strawberry slices, in a metallic teal wrapper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the whole strawberry on top, two strawberry slices on the left and right, and the full swirl of pink frosting.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the cupcake, with the whole strawberry and one prominent strawberry slice visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the green leafy base of the whole strawberry and the arrangement of strawberry slices around the frosting.
description_view_3: Side view with the whole strawberry and a single strawberry slice most visible, emphasizing the swirl pattern of the frosting.
